title: rubia olivieri subsp. doniettii
intro: Rubia olivieri subsp. doniettii, also known as Chinese rubia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, lowering blood pressure, and reducing symptoms of anxiety and depression. Rubia olivieri subsp. doniettii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal purposes, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on individual circumstances and proper guidance.
